curve.label: no-skill baseline
curve.hypothesis: Predict the training base rate for every GPU — the zero-skill floor.
curve.reflection: no learned signal; held-out ROC-AUC 0.500 by construction (base rate 0.204). Everything above this line is real skill.

curve.label: hgb / 4 features
curve.hypothesis: Baseline: hgb over all 4 features to establish the incumbent.
curve.reflection: held-out AUC 0.625, gap +0.138 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. promoted -> v1. strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

curve.label: logreg / 4 features
curve.hypothesis: Baseline: logreg over all 4 features to establish the incumbent.
curve.reflection: held-out AUC 0.682, gap +0.185 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. promoted -> v2. strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

curve.label: logreg / 2 features
curve.hypothesis: High-signal subset (logreg): power_mean, temp_mean separate the held-out classes (univariate AUC power_mean=0.66, temp_mean=0.63); drop the rest as noise.
curve.reflection: held-out AUC 0.684, gap +0.196 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. promoted -> v3. strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

rounds.hypothesis: Baseline: hgb over all 4 features to establish the incumbent.
rounds.reflection: held-out AUC 0.625, gap +0.138 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. promoted -> v1. strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

rounds.hypothesis: Baseline: logreg over all 4 features to establish the incumbent.
rounds.reflection: held-out AUC 0.682, gap +0.185 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. promoted -> v2. strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

rounds.hypothesis: High-signal subset (logreg): power_mean, temp_mean separate the held-out classes (univariate AUC power_mean=0.66, temp_mean=0.63); drop the rest as noise.
rounds.reflection: held-out AUC 0.684, gap +0.196 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. promoted -> v3. strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

rounds.hypothesis: High-signal subset (hgb): power_mean, temp_mean separate the held-out classes (univariate AUC power_mean=0.66, temp_mean=0.63); drop the rest as noise.
rounds.reflection: held-out AUC 0.606, gap +0.098 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. not promoted (0.6059 <= incumbent 0.6838). strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

rounds.hypothesis: Ablation (logreg): can power_mean alone (univariate AUC 0.66) carry the prediction?
rounds.reflection: held-out AUC 0.659, gap +0.198 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. not promoted (0.6585 <= incumbent 0.6838). strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

rounds.hypothesis: Ablation (hgb): can power_mean alone (univariate AUC 0.66) carry the prediction?
rounds.reflection: held-out AUC 0.552, gap +0.055 over the no-signal baseline; real signal above the no-signal baseline. not promoted (0.5520 <= incumbent 0.6838). strongest feature: power_mean (AUC 0.659).

honest_note: Weak signal is expected on real Kalos telemetry (lys NO-GO verdict). The self-improving LOOP/mechanism is the deliverable, not a headline AUC. The synthetic table here is deliberately weak (~0.6-0.66) to mirror reality.

real_data_reference.verdict: Weak but real, leakage-free signal (held-out ROC-AUC ~0.65). Not a standalone reliable predictor (NO-GO); the dataset + self-improving harness are the reusable deliverable (GO).
